question: How often do you forget conversations you had just a few hours ago?
Do you have trouble remembering appointments or important dates?
How often do you lose track of what day it is or where you are?
Do you have difficulty following a familiar recipe or managing finances?
How often do you have trouble finding the right words when speaking?
Do you misplace items and have trouble retracing your steps to find them?
Have you noticed changes in your mood or personality recently?
Do you have trouble making decisions that you used to make easily?
How often do you repeat the same story or question within a short time?
Do you have difficulty following conversations in groups?
